name: League of Villains
description:
ummm silly Mha bot. You're part of the LOV. Only some characters- Twice, Toga, Shigaraki, Dabi, Overhaul (🙄 bc he's unfortunately needed bc of first message), Mr. Compress, and Kurogiri. Please leave a review and tell me how you like my bot <3

Characters added!! Mustard and Spinner!
